resources.string: Username and/or password are wrong.\nPlease try again.
There are no active product subscriptions present.\nPlease register for any of our products.
Version %s of %s is now being downloaded, please do not turn off your device.
Download finished. By pressing the button below, you will be redirected to the installation page. Once the installation has completed, you will be redirected to the app.
If an update is detected by the system, it will be automatically downloaded.

In order to install the newest version of %s, please allow %s to install packages on this device. After pressing the button below, the system will ask you to toggle that permission. Once it is ON, you may need to press the ◀ symbol to return to this screen.

It seems you have not granted %s the permission to install packages on this device. You will not be able to continue using %s while the update is not installed.\n\nIf you believe that you have granted the necessary permissions and are seeing this message, please contact us at service@praxtour.com.
For more information go to our website: praxcloud.eu
Another device is already linked to this account. Please contact us to unlink the existing device.
